technology.title: Social media firms hit back as Starmer announces ban for under-16s in UK
technology.summary: Meta, YouTube and Snapchat say ban, which would stop children using their platforms, will drive them to ‘less safe services’ UK politics live – latest updates How will the ban work? UK parents: how do you feel about the ban? Britain’s plans to ban social media for under-16s will push teenagers towards more harmful platforms, the world’s biggest technology companies have said as ministers push to enact the new restrictions by next spring. Meta, YouTube and Snapchat have all criticised the ban, which was announced by Keir Starmer on Monday and would stop younger teenagers from using their services. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Meta, YouTube and Snapchat say ban, which would stop children using their platforms, will drive them to ‘less safe services’ UK politics live – latest updates How will the ban work? UK parents: how do you feel about the ban? Britain’s plans to ban social media for under-16s will push teenagers towards more harmful platforms, the world’s biggest technology companies have said as ministers push to enact the new restrictions by next spring. Meta, YouTube and Snapchat have all criticised the ban, which was announced by Keir Starmer on Monday and would stop younger teenagers from using their services. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國首相基爾·斯塔默宣布將禁止16歲以下青少年使用社交媒體，這一政策計劃於明年春季實施。Meta、YouTube和Snapchat等科技公司對此表示反對，認為此舉將迫使青少年轉向更不安全的服務。這些公司擔心，限制會對年輕用戶的安全造成負面影響。
briefing.background: 英國政府近年來對社交媒體的監管日益加強，尤其是針對未成年人的保護問題。隨著青少年心理健康問題的上升，政府希望透過立法減少青少年接觸潛在有害內容的機會。這一政策的推出標誌著政府在數位安全領域的進一步努力，旨在為年輕人創造一個更安全的網絡環境。
briefing.analysis: 科技公司對於禁止16歲以下青少年使用社交媒體的政策表示強烈反對，認為這將導致青少年轉向其他不受監管的服務，從而增加風險。這些公司強調，與其禁止使用，不如加強平台內的安全措施和教育。根據參考報導，這項禁令將影響包括TikTok和Snapchat在內的多個應用程式，並計劃在2027年正式實施。不同報導中，BBC強調了具體的應用程式影響，而Al Jazeera則專注於政策的宣布及其背景。這表明，政府與科技公司之間的利益衝突將持續，未來可能需要進一步的協商與調整。

supporting_titles: UK announces social media ban for under-16s
When will social media ban start, and which apps will be affected?
supporting_summaries: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer says the UK will ban social media for teens under the age of 16.
The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat banned for UK teens early in 2027.

technology.title: Can open-source beat OpenAI?
technology.summary: Former Hugging Face executive Tiezhen Wang explains how China's open-source strategy is reshaping the AI race.

briefing.news_focus: Former Hugging Face executive Tiezhen Wang explains how China's open-source strategy is reshaping the AI race.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 前Hugging Face高管王鐵珍指出，中國的開源策略正在重塑人工智慧競賽，挑戰OpenAI等大型企業的主導地位。這一策略的核心在於促進開源技術的發展，讓更多的開發者和企業能夠參與到AI技術的創新中，從而加速整個行業的進步。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，OpenAI等公司在市場上佔據了重要地位，並引發了全球關注。中國在此背景下，開始推動開源AI技術，試圖通過降低進入門檻，吸引更多的開發者參與，並促進本土企業的成長。這一策略不僅能夠提升技術的普及率，還可能改變全球AI市場的競爭格局，尤其是在美中科技競爭日益加劇的情況下。
briefing.analysis: 王鐵珍的觀點強調了開源策略在AI領域的重要性，這可能使得中國在技術創新上獲得優勢。相比之下，參考報導則提到市場對於大型科技公司的擴張可能出現的風險，特別是SpaceX、Anthropic和OpenAI等公司的未來發展可能會受到投資者的質疑。這顯示出不同報導對於市場動態的關注焦點有所不同，前者著重於技術創新，而後者則關注市場的健康與可持續性。隨著開源技術的興起，未來可能會出現更多的競爭者，這將進一步影響市場的格局和投資者的信心。

supporting_titles: Can the stockmarket swallow SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI?

technology.title: When will social media ban start, and which apps will be affected?
technology.summary: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat banned for UK teens early in 2027.

briefing.news_focus: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat banned for UK teens early in 2027.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國計劃在2027年初禁止16歲以下青少年使用社交媒體應用程式，包括TikTok和Snapchat。此項措施由英國首相基爾·斯塔默宣布，旨在保護青少年免受潛在的網絡風險。
briefing.background: 英國政府近年來對青少年網絡安全的關注日益增加，尤其是在社交媒體對心理健康的影響方面。隨著青少年使用社交媒體的比例上升，政府希望通過立法來限制未成年人接觸這些平台，以減少網絡欺凌和不當內容的風險。這項新政策的推動也反映了全球範圍內對社交媒體監管的趨勢，許多國家正在考慮類似的措施來保護青少年。
briefing.analysis: 各大社交媒體公司對於英國政府的禁令表示強烈反對，認為此舉將迫使青少年轉向更不安全的服務。Meta、YouTube和Snapchat等公司指出，這樣的禁令可能無法有效解決青少年面臨的網絡風險，反而可能使他們接觸到更具危險性的內容。這一觀點在《衛報》的報導中得到了強調，指出社交媒體企業擔心禁令的實施會對他們的用戶基礎造成負面影響。隨著政府計劃在明年春季之前推動這項新規，社會對於如何平衡青少年安全與科技企業運營的討論將愈加激烈。

supporting_titles: UK announces social media ban for under-16s
Social media firms hit back as Starmer announces ban for under-16s in UK
supporting_summaries: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer says the UK will ban social media for teens under the age of 16.

Meta, YouTube and Snapchat have all criticised the ban, which was announced by Keir Starmer on Monday and would stop younger teenagers from using their services. Continue reading...

politics.title: G7 leaders meet in France after U.S. and Iran declare agreement to end war
politics.summary: Discussing next steps on Iran ⁠will be one of several issues the global leaders will wrestle with during the June 15-17 summit, which will also seek common ground on the war in Ukraine

briefing.news_focus: Discussing next steps on Iran ⁠will be one of several issues the global leaders will wrestle with during the June 15-17 summit, which will also seek common ground on the war in Ukraine
briefing.news_focus_zh: G7領袖於法國召開峰會，時間為6月15日至17日，會議將討論多項議題，其中包括美國與伊朗達成的暫定協議以結束戰爭。這一協議的具體內容尚不明朗，並且會議也將尋求對烏克蘭戰爭的共識。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的關係長期緊張，雙方在多個議題上存在分歧。最近的協議標誌著雙方在結束衝突方面的潛在進展，這對於中東地區的穩定至關重要。此外，G7峰會的背景是全球面臨多重挑戰，尤其是烏克蘭戰爭的持續影響，這使得各國領導人必須尋求合作與共識。
briefing.analysis: 此次G7峰會的核心議題之一是如何應對美國與伊朗之間的暫定協議，這可能會改變中東的地緣政治格局。然而，根據Al Jazeera的報導，對於以色列是否會遵守該協議仍存在不確定性，這可能會影響協議的實施與穩定性。各國領導人在會議中需要平衡各自的國家利益，特別是在烏克蘭問題上，這可能導致不同的立場與策略。此外，若以色列對協議持反對態度，可能會使得G7國家在對伊朗政策上出現分歧，進一步複雜化局勢。

supporting_titles: Iran, US agree tentative deal to ‘end war’: Your questions answered
supporting_summaries: Uncertainty remains over whether Israel will honour the agreement.

politics.title: Geneva police use force as G7 protest escalates into violence
politics.summary: Demonstrators denounce G7 amid escalating clashes, which lead to damaged buildings and burning cars.

briefing.news_focus: Demonstrators denounce G7 amid escalating clashes, which lead to damaged buildings and burning cars.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在日內瓦，隨著G7峰會的抗議活動升級，示威者與警方之間發生了激烈衝突。抗議者對G7的政策表示不滿，導致建築物受損和汽車被焚燒。警方在面對暴力情況時，採取了強制措施以控制局勢。
briefing.background: G7峰會是由七個主要工業國組成的論壇，通常聚焦於全球經濟、政治及環境問題。隨著全球經濟不平等和氣候變化等議題日益受到關注，抗議活動在G7峰會期間變得更加頻繁。示威者通常代表不同的社會運動，對G7國家的政策提出質疑，認為這些政策未能有效解決當前的全球挑戰。日內瓦作為國際會議的中心，吸引了大量示威者，並且當地的警方在應對抗議活動時面臨著挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 此次抗議活動的暴力升級反映了對G7政策的不滿情緒，尤其是在經濟不平等和環境問題上。示威者的行動可能會引發更廣泛的社會運動，進一步挑戰政府和國際機構的決策。警方的強制措施雖然旨在維持秩序，但也可能引發更多的抗議行為，形成惡性循環。各方的立場在於，示威者希望透過抗議來引起對其訴求的重視，而政府則需要在維持公共安全與尊重言論自由之間取得平衡。這場衝突可能會影響未來G7峰會的舉辦方式及相關的安全政策。

politics.title: Indian outrage over US killing of sailors mounts as leaders attend G7 summit
politics.summary: Relations at lowest ebb in years after Washington refuses to apologise for deaths in strait of Hormuz Middle East crisis – live updates Fury has continued to mount in India over the US’s refusal to apologise for the deaths of Indian sailors killed in strikes in the strait of Hormuz, further straining relations between the two countries as their leaders meet at the G7 summit in France this week. Last week, three Indian seafarers, who were working on board commercial oil tankers, were killed when the US launched missile strikes on the vessel as it sailed through the strait of Hormuz. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Relations at lowest ebb in years after Washington refuses to apologise for deaths in strait of Hormuz Middle East crisis – live updates Fury has continued to mount in India over the US’s refusal to apologise for the deaths of Indian sailors killed in strikes in the strait of Hormuz, further straining relations between the two countries as their leaders meet at the G7 summit in France this week. Last week, three Indian seafarers, who were working on board commercial oil tankers, were killed when the US launched missile strikes on the vessel as it sailed through the strait of Hormuz. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 印度對美國在霍爾木茲海峽的空襲中造成的印度水手死亡事件表達了強烈的不滿，並要求美方道歉。這一事件使得美印關係降至多年來的低點，尤其是在兩國領導人於法國舉行的G7峰會期間。上週，三名印度水手在美軍對一艘商業油輪的導彈攻擊中喪生，進一步激化了雙方的緊張局勢。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，地緣政治風險一直存在。美國在該地區的軍事行動常常引發周邊國家的關注和不安。近年來，美印兩國在經濟和安全領域的合作有所增強，但此事件的發生卻使雙方的關係面臨重大挑戰。印度政府對美國的軍事行動表示擔憂，並對其未能對水手的死亡負責感到失望，這可能會影響雙方在其他領域的合作。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件凸顯了美印之間的緊張關係，尤其是在美國未對印度水手的死亡事件表示歉意的背景下。印度政府面臨內部壓力，要求對美方的行為作出強烈回應，這可能導致雙邊關係進一步惡化。另一方面，美國可能會認為其在霍爾木茲海峽的軍事行動是必要的，且不會因為外部壓力而改變其策略。這種立場的差異可能導致未來在貿易、安全等多方面的摩擦加劇，並使得雙方在國際場合的合作受到影響。

economy.title: US and UK central banks expected to keep interest rates on hold amid Iran peace deal
economy.summary: Federal Reserve to make first decision under Kevin Warsh as Middle East hopes ease inflation pressures Business live – latest updates Central banks in the US and UK are expected to leave interest rates on hold this week as the peace deal in the Middle East is expected to ease inflationary pressures. The US Federal Reserve is expected to hold its benchmark interest rate at a range of 3.5% to 3.75% on Thursday, in what will be the first policy decision under new Fed chair – and Donald Trump’s pick – Kevin Warsh. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Federal Reserve to make first decision under Kevin Warsh as Middle East hopes ease inflation pressures Business live – latest updates Central banks in the US and UK are expected to leave interest rates on hold this week as the peace deal in the Middle East is expected to ease inflationary pressures. The US Federal Reserve is expected to hold its benchmark interest rate at a range of 3.5% to 3.75% on Thursday, in what will be the first policy decision under new Fed chair – and Donald Trump’s pick – Kevin Warsh. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國與英國的中央銀行預計將在本週維持利率不變，這一決策受到中東和平協議的影響，預期將減輕通脹壓力。美國聯邦儲備系統將在周四的會議上保持基準利率在3.5%至3.75%的範圍內，這是新任主席凱文·華什（Kevin Warsh）首次做出的政策決定。
briefing.background: 近期中東和平協議的達成被視為有助於穩定地區局勢，並可能降低全球能源價格，進而對通脹產生緩解效果。美國聯邦儲備系統在面對持續的通脹壓力時，曾多次調整利率以應對經濟狀況。凱文·華什作為特朗普提名的主席，過去被視為通脹鷹派，但其政策方向仍待觀察，尤其是在面對當前經濟環境的變化時。
briefing.analysis: 美國和英國中央銀行的利率決策反映了對中東局勢的敏感反應。市場普遍預期，和平協議將有助於減少通脹壓力，這使得兩國央行在短期內不必進一步提高利率。然而，凱文·華什的政策取向仍然是市場關注的焦點，因為他過去的立場顯示出對通脹的高度警覺。參考報導指出，華什的立場在過去有所變化，這可能影響未來的貨幣政策走向。隨著全球經濟形勢的變化，各方將密切關注華什的政策決策及其對市場的影響。

supporting_titles: What will Kevin Warsh’s Federal Reserve look like?
supporting_summaries: Donald Trump’s nominee was an inflation hawk—until he wasn’t

economy.title: Chinese compound chip stocks surge after Supreme Court blocks Infineon in GaN patent case
economy.summary: A Chinese ban on German chip giant Infineon Technologies selling gallium nitride (GaN) products in mainland China triggered a spike in domestic semiconductor stocks on Monday, as the landmark patent dispute was expected to reshape the country’s “third-generation” chip sector. A decision by China’s Supreme People’s Court on Friday upheld a lower court’s injunction issued against the German company in May, according to a statement released by domestic rival Innoscience. The lower court found that...

briefing.news_focus: A Chinese ban on German chip giant Infineon Technologies selling gallium nitride (GaN) products in mainland China triggered a spike in domestic semiconductor stocks on Monday, as the landmark patent dispute was expected to reshape the country’s “third-generation” chip sector. A decision by China’s Supreme People’s Court on Friday upheld a lower court’s injunction issued against the German company in May, according to a statement released by domestic rival Innoscience. The lower court found that...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國最高人民法院日前裁定禁止德國半導體巨頭英飛凌科技在中國大陸銷售氮化鎵（GaN）產品，這一決定引發了中國本土半導體股票的急劇上漲。該裁定支持了早前下級法院於五月對英飛凌的禁令，這一標誌性的專利糾紛預計將重塑中國的第三代芯片產業格局。
briefing.background: 氮化鎵技術被視為第三代半導體材料，具有高效能和高頻率的特性，廣泛應用於電力電子和無線通信等領域。隨著全球對於高效能半導體需求的增加，中國在此領域的發展愈發受到重視。英飛凌作為全球領先的半導體製造商，其在中國市場的影響力不容小覷。此次專利糾紛的裁定，反映了中國在半導體自主研發及保護本土產業方面的政策取向，尤其是在面對外國技術壟斷的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 此次裁定對中國半導體行業的影響深遠，可能促進本土企業在氮化鎵技術上的研發與市場佔有率。英飛凌的禁令將使其在中國市場的競爭力下降，進一步促進中國企業如Innoscience等的崛起。這一事件也可能引發其他國家對中國半導體市場的關注，尤其是在全球供應鏈重新配置的背景下。各方利益關係中，中國政府希望透過此類措施加強本土產業，而外國企業則可能面臨更大的市場挑戰，這也可能引發進一步的貿易摩擦。

economy.title: European stock markets hit record high and oil price falls to three-month low after US-Iran peace deal – business live
economy.summary: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news Oil prices tumble amid hopes strait of Hormuz will soon reopen European stock markets have hit a record high at the start of trading, as relief over the US-Iran peace deal ripples across global markets. The pan-European Stoxx 600 index has jumped by 0.9% to 639 points, over the previous record high set just before the Iran war started, with shares rising in London, Frankfurt, Paris, Madrid and Milan. The move has given investors a clear reason to dial back some of the geopolitical risk premium that has hung over markets, especially as the Strait of Hormuz is expected to reopen and oil prices move sharply lower. Energy prices have been one of the clearest transmission channels from Middle East tensions into inflation, bond yields and equity sentiment, and there is likely to be a concerted effort to get prices down even further once this deal is finalised. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news Oil prices tumble amid hopes strait of Hormuz will soon reopen European stock markets have hit a record high at the start of trading, as relief over the US-Iran peace deal ripples across global markets. The pan-European Stoxx 600 index has jumped by 0.9% to 639 points, over the previous record high set just before the Iran war started, with shares rising in London, Frankfurt, Paris, Madrid and Milan. The move has given investors a clear reason to dial back some of the geopolitical risk premium that has hung over markets, especially as the Strait of Hormuz is expected to reopen and oil prices move sharply lower. Energy prices have been one of the clearest transmission channels from Middle East tensions into inflation, bond yields and equity sentiment, and there is likely to be a concerted effort to get prices down even further once this deal is finalised. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 歐洲股市在交易開始時達到歷史新高，因為美伊和平協議帶來的緩解情緒影響全球市場。泛歐Stoxx 600指數上漲0.9%，突破了伊朗戰爭前的歷史高點。隨著霍爾木茲海峽預期將重新開放，油價也大幅下跌，這使得投資者減少了對地緣政治風險的溢價，並促使能源價格進一步下降的可能性增加。
briefing.background: 美伊之間的緊張關係長期以來影響著全球能源市場，特別是霍爾木茲海峽作為重要的石油運輸通道。隨著美伊和平協議的達成，市場對於能源供應的擔憂有所減輕，這促使股市上漲和油價下跌。根據參考報導，布倫特原油價格下跌了5%，至每桶83美元以下，顯示出市場對於未來油價的樂觀預期。此外，歐洲的批發天然氣價格也下降了6%。
briefing.analysis: 此次美伊和平協議的達成，對於全球市場的影響顯而易見。歐洲股市的上漲反映了投資者對於地緣政治風險的重新評估，尤其是在能源價格方面。參考報導指出，這一協議可能結束歷史上最大的能源供應危機，並促使霍爾木茲海峽的重新開放，進一步穩定市場。然而，《經濟學人》的報導則提出了對未來能源市場的悲觀預期，認為即使在最佳情況下，油價仍將保持在高位，這顯示出市場對於未來的不同看法。各方利益關係的角力可能會影響後續的政策走向和市場反應。

supporting_titles: Oil prices hit three-month low and markets rally amid Iran deal breakthrough
Even the best-case scenario for energy markets is disastrous
supporting_summaries: Donald Trump posts ‘Let the oil flow’ as US-Iran peace deal sparks immediate drop for Brent crude Business live – latest updates Middle East crisis: live updates Global oil prices have tumbled to a three-month low and stock markets rallied amid fresh hopes that a US-Iran peace deal could end the greatest energy supply crisis in the history of the market. The price of Brent crude dropped 5% to below $83 (£62) a barrel as the new trading week began, amid optimism that the strait of Hormuz could reopen shortly and bring a return of Gulf oil exports to the market. Wholesale gas prices fell 6% in Europe. Continue reading...
Whatever happens, high prices will outlive the Iran war
